package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for error_detail_leaked_to_client: `c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})` or `http.Error(w, err.Error(), 500)` returning internal error details to the client
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario709Positive(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	value := r.FormValue("input")
	w.Header().Set("X-Scenario", value)
}
